message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
title Example background processing module

box "sw-explorer" #LightGray
  participant WebApp
  partition SWData {
    ' Empty for layout purposes if needed, but usually just participants are enough inside box unless specific grouping logic requires partitions. 
    ' However, looking at the original, there isn't an explicit partition named SWData around a component, rather SWData *is* the component next to WebApp within sw-explorer.
    ' Let's stick to simple participants in boxes/partitions where appropriate based on visual hierarchy.
  }
end box

participant Manager
queue MessageQueue
worker Worker
database Memcache

== Fetch New Collection ==
WebApp ->> SWData : fetch new collection\nfetch new collection
SWData ->> Manager : schedule a job\ndschedule a job

note right of Manager
 This is just an example.\nWe could got wi go with Celery,\nbut sometimes it's good\nto hide the concrete engine behind the abstraction layer.
end note

Manager ->> MessageQueue : execute a job
Worker <- - MessageQueue : update job status
Memcache <-- Manager : update job status
Worker --> Manager : job result
Memcache < -- Manager : job result

== View Pending Collection ==
WebApp ->> SWData : get job status\nget job status
SWData ->> Manager : get job status
Memcache < -- Manager : get job status

@enduml
